**By praba**

* * *

The United States attract over fifty thousand students every year from India. Despite tough admission rules, declining number of scholarships and hard competition procedures, Indian students are keen to enrol in American higher education institutions. After 9/11 tragedy the number of students going to U.S came down. But now it is bouncing back.It’s India all the way in US colleges

* * *
